title: Mass mailing not working

posts.author: Marcelo_BCN (Marcelo Frajmowicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone! I can’t make my mass email work. It’s supposed to be well configured, my control page says mails are sent, but they never arrive to my email test address.

After a day, status changes to FAIL.

Any suggestions? Thanks in advance!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Marcelo,

Sorry to hear you’re experiencing issues with our mass emailing feature!

I can confirm that we have been experiencing issues with our mass emailing feature resulting in delays in emails sending that our developers are currently working to resolve. That said, it sounds like this might be a slightly different issue… can I ask if you’re still encountering this same issue with emails failing?

posts.author: JoyIE (Joy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bianca Taylor:

e been experiencing issues with our mass emailing feature resulting in delays in emails sending that our developers are currently working to resolve. That said, it sounds like this might be a slightly different issue… can I ask if you’re still encountering this same issue with emails faili

Hi is there an update on this? I am able to send mass emails from 3 of 6 of my team’s accounts.

Please help

posts.author: MichaelB12 (MichaelB)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, same here, we have some automations and when a status change an email must to be send to a team (5 people)… But it doesn’t works from some weeks. Only one or two email are received, totally random.

PS: in my case i don’t see a fail status, automation is success.

Any progress on this bug?

posts.author: PicnicAnt (Rhys Phelps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, similar problem. Two mass email sent, one of 81 recipients, and the other of 187. All emails sent successfully on the smaller mass email. On the larger though, 82 failed to send. Both users have MS Exchange accounts. The Exchange admin center inbound message report shows a volume of less than 500 emails. The High Volume report is empty, we are not hitting that limit.
Do people have any other suggestions on data gathering to pin point the problem?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! This should be working! Did you try to reach out to support? They will be able to have a thorough look into your account and see if they are able to fix it. https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us
